were quantified as fluorescence intensity per total protein fluorescence. The four SAA isoforms, as identified by mass spectrometry (see Figure 7)
shown in the t = 8 h image represent: (A) SAA-1a-desArg, -desArgSer and -desArgSerPhePhe; (B) SAA-1a; (C) SAA-2a-desArg, -desArgSer and
-desArgSerPhePhe; (D) SAA-2a.
